org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.search.model.SearchResponse

  • Uses of SearchResponse in org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component

    Methods in org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component that return types with arguments of type SearchResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Optional<SearchResponse>
    AbstractDiscoveryComponent.backfillSearchResponse(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String label)
    When the request cache is empty (consumer ran before producer, or PPR mode), locates the producer's component config from the page tree, re-runs the API call with its stored parameters, and populates the cache so subsequent components get a cache hit.
